message:
feat(core): Add runtime validation module with regex caching

Add new validate.rs module for runtime validation helpers:
- Thread-safe RegexCache with lazy compilation and program-lifetime caching
- Avoids recompiling regex patterns on every validation call
- Supports #[derive(Validate)] macro generated code

Macro improvements (validate_derive.rs):
- Refactored to use the new runtime validation helpers
- Cleaner code generation with shared validation functions

Also update Cargo dependencies for the new module.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -16,6 +16,7 @@ workspace = true
 proc-macro2 = "1"
 quote = "1"
 syn = { version = "2", features = ["full", "extra-traits"] }
+regex = "1"  # For compile-time pattern validation
 
 [dev-dependencies]
 sqlmodel-core.workspace = true
